chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3567 - وَ رَوَى ذَرِيحُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ اَلْمُحَارِبِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "نِعْمَ اَلْعَوْنُ اَلدُّنْيَا عَلَى اَلْآخِرَةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3567 - Dharih ibn Yazid al-Muharibi narrated from Abu Abdullah (as):
"The world is an excellent aid for the Hereafter."
